history.text: A declaration of independence was issued, making sovereignty the central political claim.
The war of independence began, making sovereignty the central national struggle.
Recognized (sovereignty relinquished by Spain) strengthened international recognition.
Republic declared (end of United States occupation).
The Cuban Revolution reshaped Cuba's political life.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Cuba.

worthSeeing.title: Havana:
worthSeeing.text: Vintage 1950s cars, crumbling Baroque grandeur and the legendary Malecon seafront.

worthSeeing.title: Trinidad:
worthSeeing.text: A perfectly preserved colonial sugar town, UNESCO listed, with cobbled streets.

worthSeeing.title: Salsa Music:
worthSeeing.text: Cuba is the birthplace of salsa, son and mambo - music is everywhere.

planningQuestions.q: How should I browse it here?
